---
title: "Workshop: Scraping Google News RSS (newsscraping02.R)"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: newsscraping02
source(
  file.path("newsscraping02.R"),
  encoding = "UTF-8",
  print.eval = TRUE,
  local = knitr::knit_global()
)
```

### Iran war (single query)

```{r}
#| label: tbl-iranwar
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(
  iranwar_2026,
  caption = "Google News RSS: query \"Iran war\" (2026-02-28 to 2026-03-23)"
)
```

### Keyword searches (Trump, Israel, Iran, Tehran)

```{r}
#| label: tbl-iw-news
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(
  iw_news,
  caption = "Combined rows from keyword searches (before deduplication)"
)
```

### Deduplicated by title

```{r}
#| label: tbl-iw-news-dedup
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(
  iw_news1,
  caption = paste0("After `distinct()` by `item_title`: ", nrow(iw_news1), " rows")
)
```
